rMVPA 0.1.2

Run Permutation Searchlight Inference

Source: R/permutation_searchlight.R
run_permutation_searchlight.Rd

Computes permutation-based p-values for a searchlight MVPA result by running the analysis on permuted labels, building a covariate-adjusted null distribution, and mapping p-values back to all brain voxels.

Usage

run_permutation_searchlight(
  model_spec,
  observed = NULL,
  radius = 8,
  method = c("standard", "randomized"),
  perm_ctrl = permutation_control(),
  metric = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

model_spec

An mvpa_model or compatible model specification.

observed

Optional pre-computed searchlight result (output of run_searchlight()). If NULL, it is computed internally. Can also be a named numeric vector of observed metric values indexed by center ID.

radius

Numeric. Searchlight radius in mm (default 8).

method

Character. Searchlight method passed to run_searchlight() when observed is NULL or when perm_strategy = "searchlight".

perm_ctrl

A permutation_control object.

metric

Character. Which performance metric to use for inference. If NULL (default), the first metric is used.

...

Additional arguments forwarded to run_searchlight() (observed pass and "searchlight" permutations). For "iterate" permutations, only arguments that are formal parameters of mvpa_iterate are forwarded; other keys are ignored for that path to avoid argument-mismatch failures (e.g., engine = "legacy" is meaningful for run_searchlight but not for mvpa_iterate).

Value

A permutation_result S3 object containing:

p_map

Spatial map of raw p-values.

p_adj_map

Spatial map of FDR-adjusted p-values (if requested).

p_values

Numeric vector of raw p-values (all centers).

p_adjusted

Numeric vector of adjusted p-values.

observed

The observed searchlight result.

diagnostics

A "null_diagnostics" object (if diagnose = TRUE).

perm_ctrl

The permutation_control used.

metric

Metric name used for inference.

perm_strategy

The strategy that was actually used.

Permutation strategy

The perm_strategy field in perm_ctrl determines how each permutation pass is executed. The two strategies share the same downstream pipeline (null construction, p-value scoring, FDR correction) — they differ only in how null metric values are produced. Neither strategy contains any engine-specific branching.

"iterate" (default)

Calls mvpa_iterate on a subsampled set of centers. This is the generic per-ROI iterator that works with every model type and every dataset class. The subsample parameter in perm_ctrl controls how many centers are evaluated per permutation.

Null pool size: n_perm * n_subsampled_centers.

Best for: slow classifiers, large brains, limited compute. The subsampling gives a 5–20\(\times\) speedup over a full-brain pass.

"searchlight"

Calls run_searchlight on the full brain for each permutation. Because the call goes through the standard run_searchlight S3 dispatch, it automatically benefits from any fast engine the model qualifies for (e.g.\ SWIFT, dual-LDA) and from any user-defined run_searchlight.<class> method. No engine-specific code exists here — it is purely the standard run_searchlight call.

Since the full brain is computed anyway, all centers contribute to the null distribution (the subsample parameter is ignored and a note is logged). This yields a richer null and therefore better-calibrated p-values.

Null pool size: n_perm * all_centers.

Best for: models with a fast searchlight engine, or when you want the richest possible null distribution.

Examples

# \donttest{
  ds    <- gen_sample_dataset(c(5, 5, 5), 20, blocks = 2, nlevels = 2)
  cval  <- blocked_cross_validation(ds$design$block_var)
  mdl   <- load_model("sda_notune")
  mspec <- mvpa_model(mdl, ds$dataset, ds$design, "classification",
                      crossval = cval)

  # Strategy 1: subsampled iterator (default, universal)
  pc1   <- permutation_control(n_perm = 10, subsample = 0.2, seed = 1L)
  res1  <- run_permutation_searchlight(mspec, radius = 3, perm_ctrl = pc1)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:27] Running observed searchlight (radius = 3 mm) ...
#> Warning: run_searchlight preflight reported 0 failure(s) and 1 warning(s).
#> block_count: Only 2 blocks found. Leave-one-block-out CV will have only 2 folds, providing limited evaluation with high variance estimates.
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:27] searchlight engine: legacy (no eligible fast path)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:27] Running standard searchlight with radius = 3
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:27] shard backend: preparing shared memory for dataset (mvpa_image_dataset, mvpa_dataset, list)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:27] shard backend [volumetric]: shared 20 x 125 matrix (125 masked voxels)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:27] creating standard searchlight
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:27] running standard searchlight iterator
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:38] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 125
#> - Processed: 125
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:38] searchlight (standard): 125 ROIs processed (success=125, errors=0)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:38] Building searchlight iterator ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:38] Subsampling searchlight centers ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:38] Using 25 / 125 centers for permutation runs.
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:38] Permutation 1 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:41] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:41] Permutation 2 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:44] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:44] Permutation 3 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:47] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:47] Permutation 4 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:49] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:50] Permutation 5 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:52] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:53] Permutation 6 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:55] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:56] Permutation 7 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:58] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:08:58] Permutation 8 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:01] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:01] Permutation 9 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:04] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:04] Permutation 10 / 10 (strategy: iterate) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 25
#> - Processed: 25
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] Running null diagnostics ...
#> Null Distribution Diagnostics (n_perm = 10 )
#> -------------------------------------------------- 
#>   nfeatures            [OK]
#>     rho=-0.023  p=0.7178
#>     No significant correlation with nfeatures.
#> -------------------------------------------------- 
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] Building adjusted null distribution (adjusted, 5 bins) ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] Computing p-values for 125 centers ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] Building p-value spatial maps ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] Done. 0 centers significant at FDR < 0.05 (fdr).

  # Strategy 2: full-brain via run_searchlight (engine-aware)
  pc2   <- permutation_control(n_perm = 5, perm_strategy = "searchlight",
                               seed = 1L)
  res2  <- run_permutation_searchlight(mspec, radius = 3, perm_ctrl = pc2)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] Running observed searchlight (radius = 3 mm) ...
#> Warning: run_searchlight preflight reported 0 failure(s) and 1 warning(s).
#> block_count: Only 2 blocks found. Leave-one-block-out CV will have only 2 folds, providing limited evaluation with high variance estimates.
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] searchlight engine: legacy (no eligible fast path)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] Running standard searchlight with radius = 3
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] shard backend: preparing shared memory for dataset (mvpa_image_dataset, mvpa_dataset, list)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] shard backend [volumetric]: shared 20 x 125 matrix (125 masked voxels)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] creating standard searchlight
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:07] running standard searchlight iterator
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:18] 
#> MVPA Iteration Complete
#> - Total ROIs: 125
#> - Processed: 125
#> - Skipped: 0
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:19] searchlight (standard): 125 ROIs processed (success=125, errors=0)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:19] Building searchlight iterator ...
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:19] Strategy = 'searchlight': full brain computed per permutation. 'subsample' parameter ignored; all 125 centers contribute to null.
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:19] Permutation 1 / 5 (strategy: searchlight) ...
#> Warning: run_searchlight preflight reported 0 failure(s) and 1 warning(s).
#> block_count: Only 2 blocks found. Leave-one-block-out CV will have only 2 folds, providing limited evaluation with high variance estimates.
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:19] searchlight engine: legacy (no eligible fast path)
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:19] Running standard searchlight with radius = 3
#> INFO [2026-04-24 15:09:19] shard backend: preparing shared memory for dataset (mvpa_image_dataset, mvpa_dataset, list)
